changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS departments ( id Integer not null, created_by character varying(255) , created_date timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL, last_modified_by character varying(255) , last_modified_date timestamp(6) without time zone, deleted_by character varying(255) , deleted_date timestamp(6) without time zone, is_delete boolean DEFAULT false, serial_id VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, parent_serial_id VARCHAR(50) , name VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(100), account_id BIGINT, CONSTRAINT app_departments_p_key PRIMARY KEY (id) );
CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS department_id_seq INCREMENT 1 START 1 NO MINVALUE NO MAXVALUE CACHE 1 OWNED BY departments.id;
